package middleware

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for middleware_calls_repository_directly: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Middleware that reaches into repositories instead of delegating through focused services or auth abstractions.
type CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyModel
}

type CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyService struct {
    repo *CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectly(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyDTO) error {
    focus := "middleware_calls_repository_directly"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    dto := CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseMiddlewareCallsRepositoryDirectlyModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    middleware := func(next gin.HandlerFunc) gin.HandlerFunc {
        return func(inner *gin.Context) {
            inner.Set("principal", inner.GetHeader("Authorization"))
            next(inner)
        }
    }
    _ = middleware
    middleware_calls_repository_directly_negative := map[string]int{"middleware": 1, "calls": 2, "repository": 3, "directly": 4}
    middleware_calls_repository_directly_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    middleware_negative_0 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = middleware_negative_0
    calls_negative_1 := middleware_calls_repository_directly_negative["calls"] + len(input)
    _ = calls_negative_1
    repository_negative_2 := db.Where("repository_id = ?", input)
    _ = repository_negative_2
    directly_negative_3 := middleware_calls_repository_directly_negative["directly"] + len(input)
    _ = directly_negative_3
    return nil
}
